ourStory.title: Welcome to ShopSphere
ourStory.subtitle: Discover a world of luxury fragrances, curated for elegance and individual expression.
ourStory.story1: ShopSphere was born from a passion for scents that tell a story. We believe a fragrance is more than just a smell; it's an invisible accessory that defines your presence.
ourStory.story2: Our collection is carefully curated from around the world, featuring niche houses and designer masterpieces that evoke emotion and memory.
ourStory.story3: We are dedicated to helping you find your signature scent, providing an immersive experience that celebrates the art of perfumery.
ourStory.experienceSubtitle: Explore curated products, seamless shopping, and a customer experience designed around clarity and convenience.
ourStory.traditionText1: SHOPSPHERE is built around careful product selection, dependable quality, and a modern buying experience that feels easy from browse to checkout.
ourStory.traditionText2: From discovery to delivery, every part of SHOPSPHERE is designed to help customers shop with confidence.
ourStory.visionText: To be more than just a store - to become a trusted destination where customers discover products they love through a polished, reliable shopping experience.
ourStory.visionQuote: Every order at SHOPSPHERE should feel simple, reliable, and worth coming back for.
ourStory.visionClosing: Join us as we continue to build a smarter and more enjoyable way to shop.
ourStory.ctaSubtitle: Explore a shopping experience built around quality, trust, and convenience.

heritage.title: Curated Heritage
heritage.description: Celebrating the timeless traditions of global perfumery, from Grasse to the Orient.

excellence.title: Olfactory Excellence
excellence.description: Our experts curate each bottle based on complexity, longevity, and the unique story behind the fragrance.

ingredients.title: Purest Ingredients
ingredients.description: From natural absolutes to modern aromachemicals, we focus on fragrances crafted with the highest quality materials.

hospitality.title: Personalized Scenting
hospitality.description: We offer one-on-one consultations to help you navigate our collection and discover your olfactory identity.

ourStory.valuesSubtitle: Four pillars that define the SHOPSPHERE experience and our commitment to quality shopping.

recipes.title: Expert Curation
recipes.description: Every fragrance in our collection is handpicked for its unique character and quality.

fresh.title: Global Reach
fresh.description: Sourcing the most sought-after scents from independent labs and historic houses worldwide.

dining.title: Signature Scents
dining.description: Helping you find the perfect fragrance for every occasion, season, and mood.

family.title: Authenticity Guaranteed
family.description: We deal only in 100% authentic products, sourced directly from manufacturers or authorized distributors.

menu.title: Fragrance Collection
menu.subtitle: Discover our exquisite selection of designer and niche perfumes

cart.title: Shopping Cart
cart.emptyCartMessage: Find your next signature scent in our collection!

checkout.storeClosedMessage: Checkout is disabled while the store is closed. You can browse the menu and come back later.

customerSupport.title: Customer Support
customerSupport.helpDescription: At SHOPSPHERE, we're committed to providing excellent customer service. Whether you have questions about our catalog, need help with an order, or want to share feedback, our team is here to assist you.
customerSupport.callDescription: Available during business hours for immediate assistance with orders, reservations, or inquiries.
customerSupport.emailDescription: Send us an email anytime. We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.
customerSupport.faqAnswer1: Absolutely. We guarantee 100% authenticity for every product in our catalog. We source directly from official distributors and reputable houses.
customerSupport.faqQuestion2: What is the difference between EDP and EDT?
customerSupport.faqAnswer2: Eau de Parfum (EDP) has a higher concentration of fragrance oils (15-20%) and usually lasts longer, while Eau de Toilette (EDT) is lighter (5-15%) and better for daily wear.
customerSupport.faqQuestion3: How should I store my perfume?
customerSupport.faqAnswer3: Keep your bottles in a cool, dark place away from direct sunlight and humidity to preserve the integrity of the scent.
customerSupport.faqQuestion4: Can I sample a fragrance before buying?
customerSupport.faqAnswer4: Currently, we sell full bottles, but we are working on a discovery set program. Stay tuned for updates!
customerSupport.faqAnswer5: We currently ship across India. Check our shipping policy for details.

footer.aboutText: Discover curated products at SHOPSPHERE. A cleaner, smarter way to shop online.
